summary: Iteration 10 testing complete. All new features verified: (1) Hero image changed to AI-generated Indian man from emergentagent CDN, (2) Trust section image changed to handshake from Unsplash, (3) 52 total loan products across 10 categories and 20 banks, (4) New loan types added: Gold (5), 2nd Hand Vehicle (4), Plot (4), Loan Against MF (4), (5) All 10 category filter pills render correctly, (6) Category filtering works for all new loan types, (7) Muthoot Finance and Manappuram Finance bank logos render correctly, (8) Onboarding page shows all 10 loan types, (9) Login works without 429 errors, (10) Stats bar shows 35+ Banks and 10 Loan Categories.
passed_tests: Backend: Health endpoint returns 200
Backend: GET /api/loans/products returns 52 total products
Backend: All 10 loan categories present (personal, home, car, bike, education, gold, used_vehicle, plot, mutual_funds)
Backend: Gold loans filter returns 5 products (Muthoot, Manappuram, SBI, HDFC, Canara)
Backend: Used vehicle loans filter returns 4 products
Backend: Plot loans filter returns 4 products
Backend: Mutual funds loans filter returns 4 products
Backend: Existing categories unchanged (personal:13, home:10, car:6, bike:3, education:3)
Backend: 20 unique banks in products
Backend: All products have required fields
Backend: Login with valid credentials returns 200 (no 429 errors)
Backend: Login with invalid credentials returns 401
Backend: Multiple login attempts work without 429
Backend: Gold loan features validated (no income requirement)
Backend: Used vehicle loan features validated (higher interest rates)
Backend: Plot loan features validated (longer tenure, higher amounts)
Backend: Mutual funds loan features validated (no income requirement, no foreclosure)
Frontend: Landing page loads correctly
Frontend: Hero image is AI-generated from emergentagent CDN
Frontend: Hero image alt text: 'Indian professional comparing loan options on phone and laptop'
Frontend: Trust section image is from Unsplash (handshake)
Frontend: Stats bar shows '35+' Banks & NBFCs
Frontend: Stats bar shows '10' Loan Categories
Frontend: All 10 category filter pills render (All, Personal, Home, Car, Bike, Education, Gold, 2nd Hand Vehicle, Plot, Loan Against MF)
Frontend: 'All' category shows 52 products
Frontend: 'Gold Loan' filter shows 5 cards
Frontend: '2nd Hand Vehicle' filter shows 4 cards
Frontend: 'Plot Loan' filter shows 4 cards
Frontend: 'Loan Against MF' filter shows 4 cards
Frontend: Muthoot Finance bank logo renders (MUT)
Frontend: Manappuram Finance bank logo renders (MAN)
Frontend: Onboarding page shows all 10 loan types
Frontend: Login redirects to landing page without errors
seed_data_creation: None - 52 products seeded by backend on startup
